payload.name: SurfPad Black Logo - Large
payload.description: SurfPad Payment Terminal in Black - Large Size

reqParams.name: storeId
reqParams.description: Unique identifier of the store where the variant exists.

reqParams.name: category
reqParams.description: This refers to a grouping of similar variants that share a common characteristics.

reqParams.name: unit
reqParams.description: This refers to the metric unit of the variant. The possible values are 'm' , 'mm' , 'cm' , 'km' , 'in' , 'ft' , 'mi' , 'kg' , 'g' , 'mg' , 'lb' , 'oz' , 'l' , 'ml' , 'cu. m' , 'gal' , 'pt' , 'fl oz' , 'W' , 'kW' , 'kWh' , 'sq m' , 'sq km' , 'sq ft' , 'h' , 'min' , 's' , 'days' , 'wk' , 'mn' , 'yr' , 'nos'.

reqParams.name: variantImages
reqParams.description: An array of URLs showcasing the variant images.

reqParams.name: hsnCode
reqParams.description: A 6-digit uniform code that identifies the variant.

reqParams.name: barCode
reqParams.description: Encoded white and black lines on the variants.

reqParams.name: variantProperties
reqParams.description: Denotes the additional properties that describe the variant details which includes type, size, origin, weight, manufacturer, etc.

resParams.name: status
resParams.description: Status of the request, indicated as either 'SUCCESS' or 'ERROR'.

resParams.name: message
resParams.description: A message that describes the status of the request.
